settings.title: Acupuncture
settings.description: A holistic treatment method from Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) using fine needles to restore balance in the body, regulate energy flow, relieve pain, and support physical and emotional wellbeing.

settings.title: Moxibustion (Moxa)
settings.description: A holistic treatment method from Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) using fine needles to restore balance in the body, regulate energy flow, relieve pain, and support physical and emotional wellbeing.

settings.title: Cupping Therapy
settings.description: A therapeutic technique using suction cups to release muscle tension, improve blood circulation, reduce pain, and support detoxification and recovery.

settings.title: Gua Sha
settings.description: A traditional therapeutic technique using smooth tools to gently stimulate the skin and fascia, improve circulation, release muscular tension, support lymphatic flow, and promote healing and relaxation.

settings.title: Tuina Massage
settings.description: A therapeutic Chinese medical massage combining acupressure and manual techniques to relieve muscular tension, improve circulation, and restore balance in the body.

settings.title: Electroacupuncture
settings.description: A modern extension of traditional acupuncture where gentle electrical stimulation is applied through acupuncture needles to enhance therapeutic effects. Electroacupuncture is commonly used for pain relief, muscular and neurological conditions, tension, circulation support, and chronic disorders. It can help stimulate nerves and muscles more deeply while promoting the body’s natural healing processes.

settings.title: Aesthetic Acupuncture
settings.description: A natural facial rejuvenation treatment designed to improve skin tone, stimulate collagen production, reduce tension in facial muscles, and support overall wellbeing from within.

settings.title: Nutritional Advice According to TCM
settings.description: Personalized nutritional guidance based on the principles of Traditional Chinese Medicine. Nutrition is adapted to each individual’s constitution, symptoms, and energetic balance in order to support digestion, strengthen vitality, improve overall health, and complement acupuncture treatments. Recommendations may help with fatigue, digestive disorders, hormonal balance, stress, sleep, immunity, pregnancy support, and general wellbeing.

settings.title: Infrared Light Therapy
settings.description: A gentle and non-invasive therapy using infrared light to support healing, improve circulation, reduce inflammation, relieve muscular tension, and promote relaxation. Infrared therapy may be used alongside acupuncture and other TCM treatments to support pain relief, recovery, stress reduction, and overall wellbeing.
